nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mundeford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Munford
meanings: English (Norfolk): habitational name from Mundford in Norfolk, so named from the Old English personal name Munda + Old English ford ‘ford’.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Mountford  .

variants.name: Mountford
meanings: English (Staffordshire; of Norman origin): habitational name from Montfort-sur-Risle (Eure) or from one or other of various places called Montfort in France (from Old French mont ‘hill’ + fort ‘fortress’). Early forms of this name are indistinguishable from those of Mundford in Norfolk, perhaps indicating an alternative habitational name (see Munford ).

History: A Norman bearer of this name, from Montfort-sur-Risle in Eure, near Brionne, accompanied William the Conqueror in his invasion of England in 1066. Simon de Montfort, 6th Earl of Leicester, led a rebellion against Henry III (1216–1272).

nameMeanings.name: Adam
meanings: Hebrew: The Scripture name, in Hebrew, Adham, signifying 'man;' literally earthy, red earth; Rudolph, however, says the name in Ethiopic means ' to be fair, beautiful.' Hence the nurse-name Addy, little Adam.

en.lifeSummary: Adam de Mundeford I was born in 1170. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1234, in Mundford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64, and was buried in Mundford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Adam de Mundeford I est né en 1170. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1234, à Mundford, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Mundford, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Adam de Mundeford I wurde 1170 geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1234 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Mundford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Mundford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Adam de Mundeford I è nato il nel 1170. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1234, nel Mundford, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Mundford, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Mundford, Norfolk, England: イギリスイギリスノーフォルクムンドフォード
ja.lifeSummary: Adam de Mundeford Iは1170年に生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1234年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクムンドフォードで64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクムンドフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam de Mundeford I(은)는 1170년 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1234년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 먼드퍼드에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 먼드퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Adam de Mundeford I nasceu em 1170. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1234, em Mundford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Mundford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Adam de Mundeford I родился в 1170 г. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1234 г. в местности мундфорд, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности мундфорд, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Adam de Mundeford I nació en 1170. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1234, en Mundford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Mundford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
